mapper.sql: openTime_id, laboratory_id, device_id, manager_id, start_time, end_time, status, created_at, week
mapper.insert: insert into opentime (openTime_id, laboratory_id, device_id, manager_id, start_time, end_time, status, created_at, week) values (#{openTime_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}), #{week,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

insert into opentime
openTime_id,
week,
laboratory_id,
device_id,
manager_id,
start_time,
end_time,
status,
created_at,
#{openTime_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{week,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update opentime
laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
week = #{week,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
start_time = #{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where openTime_id = #{openTime_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update opentime set laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, week = #{week,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, start_time = #{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where openTime_id = #{openTime_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert:
insert into opentime( laboratory_id, manager_id, week, start_time, end_time, status, created_at ) values
( #{item.laboratory_id}, #{item.manager_id}, #{item.week}, #{item.start_time}, #{item.end_time}, #{item.status}, #{item.created_at} )

insert into opentime( device_id, manager_id, week, start_time, end_time, status, created_at ) values
( #{item.device_id}, #{item.manager_id}, #{item.week}, #{item.start_time}, #{item.end_time}, #{item.status}, #{item.created_at} )
mapper.select:
select
from opentime where device_id = #{deviceId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status = '空闲' order by start_time

select
from opentime where laboratory_id = #{laboratoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status = '空闲' order by start_time
